title: IV (disambiguation)
content:
'''IV''' could mean:

==In-universe==
*[[Form IV/Legends|Form IV: Ataru]], a lightsaber form which was used most notably by [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[IV tap]], a medical device used to administer drugs

==Out-of-universe==
*[[Celebration IV]], a Star Wars event held in Los Angeles in [[2007]].
*{{Film|IV}}, the first Star Wars film ever made and the fourth chronologically

{{Disambig}}
